positive: An atmospheric, retro-futuristic celestial map showing constellations and stylized planets orbiting a central nebula. Deep indigo and electric turquoise color palette. Art deco influence, vaporwave aesthetic, clean linework, cosmic horror meets vintage poster design.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, cartoonish, messy, organic, watercolor
